name: @shaderbase/cli
description: Agent-first shader registry CLI for Three.js — search and add shaders to your project

scripts.build: bun build src/bin.ts --outdir dist --target node && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/bin.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+fs.readFileSync(f))"
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types src/registry-types.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/resolve-source.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/build-manifest.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/github-pr.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/commands/submit.test.ts
